result:
Incremental rebuild reflects the 7 changed files cleanly. The `make` build in `wpa_supplicant/` completed with only a pre-existing, unrelated warning and linked `wpa_supplicant`, `wpa_cli`, `wpa_passphrase` successfully — build is green.

Summary of changes: `struct wpa_scan_res` in `src/drivers/driver.h` now has `struct { int qual; int noise; } sig;` replacing the two flat fields, with all 10 call sites across `wpa_supplicant/bss.c`, `scan.c`, `events.c`, and `src/drivers/driver_bsd.c`, `driver_nl80211_scan.c`, `driver_wext.c` updated to `->sig.qual`/`->sig.noise`. Unrelated `qual`/`noise` fields on `struct wpa_bss` (in `ctrl_iface.c`, `dbus_old_handlers.c`) and `iw_quality` (in `driver_wext.c`) were correctly left untouched.
